nodes.title: Welcome to NovaCMS
nodes.heroTitle: The Open Source CMS for the Modern Web

heroDescription.processed: NovaCMS is a headless content management system built for developers who demand performance, extensibility, and freedom. Ship faster with a CMS that gets out of your way.
heroDescription.summary: NovaCMS is a headless content management system built for developers who demand performance, extensibility, and freedom. Ship faster with a CMS that gets out of your way.

ctaDescription.processed: Get started in minutes with our CLI installer, comprehensive documentation, and a thriving community of developers ready to help.
ctaDescription.summary: Get started in minutes with our CLI installer, comprehensive documentation, and a thriving community of developers ready to help.
